findings.description: The firefighter user and the original ticket requester are the same person (self-approval pattern).

suggested_correction.message_to_firefighter:
Hello MNOWAK,

During our review of PRB0078310, we identified a potential self-approval issue. Could you please provide additional details on why this transaction was posted by the same user who requested it? Specifically, can you clarify if there were any exceptional circumstances that necessitated this action?

Thank you for your cooperation.
Best regards,
[Your Name] SAP GRC Compliance Team
suggested_correction.suggested_reason_rewrite: Fixed payment posting issue in FB03 transaction at company code 100; root cause was a self-approval pattern due to the user being both the ticket requester and the transaction performer. Actions taken include documentation of the exceptional circumstances that justified this action.
